personal.name: Suryanandan Kumar
personal.title: DevOps Engineer
personal.quote: If something can be automated, I'll script it — laziness is just efficiency in disguise.

about.summary: I'm a DevOps and Cloud enthusiast focused on building reliable, automated infrastructure. I enjoy turning complex, manual workflows into clean, repeatable systems — whether that's a Dockerized application, a CI/CD pipeline, a cloud deployment on AWS, or an intelligent RAG-powered application.
about.currentlyBuilding: Dockerized apps, CI/CD pipelines, RAG systems & AWS deployments
about.currentlyLearning: Kubernetes, Terraform, advanced AWS & LLM application development
about.openToCollaborate: Open-source DevOps, cloud infrastructure & automation projects
about.askMeAbout: C++, SQL, Linux, Git & cloud deployment fundamentals

projects.name: PDF-RAG-Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered PDF RAG Chatbot using LangChain, Mistral AI, FAISS, Streamlit and SQLite. Enables intelligent question-answering over PDF documents.

projects.name: Job-Application-Tracker
projects.description: A simple and interactive Job Application Tracker built using Streamlit. Helps users manage job applications efficiently with features like authentication, tracking, and analytics.

experience.description: Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, containerized applications, and cloud infrastructure.
Developing intelligent RAG systems combining LLMs with production-ready DevOps practices.
Automating infrastructure with Terraform, Ansible across AWS and GCP environments.
